rashi_horoscopes.Mesha (Aries): Today you may feel a surge of energy. Channel it into productive tasks. Your lucky color is red. Tip: Offer water to the Sun in the morning.
rashi_horoscopes.Vrishabha (Taurus): A good day for financial planning. Avoid arguments. Wear green for luck. Tip: Donate white clothes to the needy.
rashi_horoscopes.Mithuna (Gemini): Communication skills shine today. Connect with loved ones. Lucky number 5. Tip: Chant the Gayatri mantra.
rashi_horoscopes.Karka (Cancer): Emotions run deep today. Spend time near water. Lucky color silver. Tip: Help your mother or an elder.
rashi_horoscopes.Simha (Leo): Leadership qualities are strong. Take initiative at work. Lucky stone ruby. Tip: Practice Surya Namaskar.
rashi_horoscopes.Kanya (Virgo): Focus on health and routine. Organize your space. Lucky number 8. Tip: Offer food to birds.
rashi_horoscopes.Tula (Libra): Harmony in relationships is key. Avoid conflicts. Lucky color blue. Tip: Light a ghee lamp in the evening.
rashi_horoscopes.Vrishchika (Scorpio): Deep insights may come. Trust your intuition. Lucky color maroon. Tip: Chant the Mahamrityunjaya mantra.
rashi_horoscopes.Dhanu (Sagittarius): Adventure calls. Plan something new. Lucky number 3. Tip: Feed a stray animal.
rashi_horoscopes.Makara (Capricorn): Career opportunities arise. Stay disciplined. Lucky stone blue sapphire. Tip: Donate black sesame seeds.
rashi_horoscopes.Kumbha (Aquarius): Innovative ideas flow. Share your knowledge. Lucky color purple. Tip: Practice meditation for 10 minutes.
rashi_horoscopes.Meena (Pisces): Creativity and spirituality are heightened. Listen to music. Lucky number 9. Tip: Visit a temple or holy place.
